case_title: TRIONFO LLC, VS. SHOTO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED JAN-29-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHOTO (SACHIN DUGGAL CEO)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRIONFO LLC,

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH ALESSANDRO CAMPITELLI (TITLE: OWNER). THE DEFENDANT SACHIN DUGGAL WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT SHOTO, INC WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH KACIE GONZALEZ (TITLE: VP BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT). PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRIONFO LLC, RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUGGAL, SACHIN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST SHOTO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TRIONFO LLC, AS TO DEFENDANT SHOTO (SACHIN DUGGAL CEO) DUGGAL, SACHIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SHOTO (SACHIN DUGGAL CEO) DUGGAL, SACHIN
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AMILED TO SACHIN DUGGAL RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHOTO (SACHIN DUGGAL CEO)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.
